recommendations.title: One False Move

recommendations.title: Devil in a Blue Dress
recommendations.overview: In late 1940s Los Angeles, Easy Rawlins is an unemployed black World War II veteran with few job prospects. At a bar, Easy meets DeWitt Albright, a mysterious white man looking for someone to investigate the disappearance of a missing white woman nam

recommendations.title: Talk to Her
recommendations.overview: Two men share an odd friendship while they care for two women who are both in deep comas.

recommendations.title: Emma.
recommendations.overview: In 1800s England, a well-meaning but selfish young woman meddles in the love lives of her friends.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: A Little Bit of Heaven
recommendations.overview: A guarded woman finds out she's dying of cancer but, when she meets her match, the threat of falling in love is scarier than death.

recommendations.title: What They Had
recommendations.overview: A woman must fly back to her hometown when her Alzheimer's-stricken mother wanders into a blizzard. The return home forces her to confront her past.
